commandDescriptors.name: focus
commandDescriptors.summary: Focus a neighboring window.

commandDescriptors.name: focus-previous
commandDescriptors.summary: Focus the previously focused window.

commandDescriptors.name: focus-down-or-left
commandDescriptors.summary: Traverse backward through the active Niri workspace.

commandDescriptors.name: focus-up-or-right
commandDescriptors.summary: Traverse forward through the active Niri workspace.

commandDescriptors.name: focus-column
commandDescriptors.summary: Focus a Niri column by one-based index.

commandDescriptors.name: focus-column-first
commandDescriptors.summary: Focus the first Niri column.

commandDescriptors.name: focus-column-last
commandDescriptors.summary: Focus the last Niri column.

commandDescriptors.name: move
commandDescriptors.summary: Move the focused window in the given direction.

commandDescriptors.name: switch-workspace
commandDescriptors.summary: Switch to a workspace on the interaction monitor by workspace ID.

commandDescriptors.name: switch-workspace-next
commandDescriptors.summary: Switch to the next workspace on the current monitor.

commandDescriptors.name: switch-workspace-previous
commandDescriptors.summary: Switch to the previous workspace on the current monitor.

commandDescriptors.name: switch-workspace-back-and-forth
commandDescriptors.summary: Switch to the previously active workspace on the current monitor.

commandDescriptors.name: switch-workspace-anywhere
commandDescriptors.summary: Focus a workspace by workspace ID across all monitors.

commandDescriptors.name: move-to-workspace
commandDescriptors.summary: Move the focused window to a workspace by workspace ID.

commandDescriptors.name: move-to-workspace-up
commandDescriptors.summary: Move the focused window to the adjacent workspace above.

commandDescriptors.name: move-to-workspace-down
commandDescriptors.summary: Move the focused window to the adjacent workspace below.

commandDescriptors.name: move-to-workspace-on-monitor
commandDescriptors.summary: Move the focused window to a workspace already assigned to the requested adjacent monitor.

commandDescriptors.name: focus-monitor-previous
commandDescriptors.summary: Move interaction focus to the previous monitor.

commandDescriptors.name: focus-monitor-next
commandDescriptors.summary: Move interaction focus to the next monitor.

commandDescriptors.name: focus-monitor-last
commandDescriptors.summary: Move interaction focus back to the previous monitor.

commandDescriptors.name: move-column
commandDescriptors.summary: Move the focused Niri column in the given direction.

commandDescriptors.name: move-column-to-workspace
commandDescriptors.summary: Move the focused Niri column to a workspace by workspace ID.

commandDescriptors.name: move-column-to-workspace-up
commandDescriptors.summary: Move the focused Niri column to the adjacent workspace above.

commandDescriptors.name: move-column-to-workspace-down
commandDescriptors.summary: Move the focused Niri column to the adjacent workspace below.

commandDescriptors.name: toggle-column-tabbed
commandDescriptors.summary: Toggle tabbed mode for the focused Niri column.

commandDescriptors.name: cycle-column-width-forward
commandDescriptors.summary: Cycle column width presets forward.

commandDescriptors.name: cycle-column-width-backward
commandDescriptors.summary: Cycle column width presets backward.

commandDescriptors.name: toggle-column-full-width
commandDescriptors.summary: Toggle full-width mode for the focused Niri column.

commandDescriptors.name: swap-workspace-with-monitor
commandDescriptors.summary: Swap the active workspace with the active workspace on an adjacent monitor.

commandDescriptors.name: balance-sizes
commandDescriptors.summary: Balance layout sizes in the active workspace.

commandDescriptors.name: move-to-root
commandDescriptors.summary: Move the selected Dwindle window to the root split.

commandDescriptors.name: toggle-split
commandDescriptors.summary: Toggle the active Dwindle split orientation.

commandDescriptors.name: swap-split
commandDescriptors.summary: Swap the active Dwindle split.

commandDescriptors.name: resize
commandDescriptors.summary: Resize the selected Dwindle window.

commandDescriptors.name: preselect
commandDescriptors.summary: Set the Dwindle preselection direction.

commandDescriptors.name: preselect-clear
commandDescriptors.summary: Clear the Dwindle preselection.

commandDescriptors.name: open-command-palette
commandDescriptors.summary: Toggle the command palette.

commandDescriptors.name: raise-all-floating-windows
commandDescriptors.summary: Raise all visible floating windows.

commandDescriptors.name: rescue-offscreen-windows
commandDescriptors.summary: Clamp tracked floating windows back onto their visible monitors.

commandDescriptors.name: toggle-focused-window-floating
commandDescriptors.summary: Toggle the focused managed window between tiled and floating.

commandDescriptors.name: scratchpad-assign
commandDescriptors.summary: Assign the focused managed window to the scratchpad.

commandDescriptors.name: scratchpad-toggle
commandDescriptors.summary: Show or hide the scratchpad window.

commandDescriptors.name: open-menu-anywhere
commandDescriptors.summary: Open the menu surface anywhere.

commandDescriptors.name: toggle-workspace-bar
commandDescriptors.summary: Toggle runtime workspace bar visibility.

commandDescriptors.name: toggle-hidden-bar
commandDescriptors.summary: Toggle the hidden bar surface.

commandDescriptors.name: toggle-quake-terminal
commandDescriptors.summary: Toggle the configured Quake terminal.

commandDescriptors.name: toggle-workspace-layout
commandDescriptors.summary: Toggle the current workspace between Niri and Dwindle.

commandDescriptors.name: set-workspace-layout
commandDescriptors.summary: Set the current workspace layout explicitly.

commandDescriptors.name: toggle-fullscreen
commandDescriptors.summary: Toggle OmniWM-managed fullscreen.

commandDescriptors.name: toggle-native-fullscreen
commandDescriptors.summary: Toggle native macOS fullscreen.

commandDescriptors.name: toggle-overview
commandDescriptors.summary: Toggle the overview surface.

queryDescriptors.name: workspace-bar
queryDescriptors.summary: Return the workspace bar projection for every monitor.

queryDescriptors.name: active-workspace
queryDescriptors.summary: Return the current interaction monitor and active workspace snapshot.

queryDescriptors.name: focused-monitor
queryDescriptors.summary: Return the current interaction monitor and its active workspace snapshot.

queryDescriptors.name: apps
queryDescriptors.summary: Return the managed app summary used by OmniWM surfaces.

queryDescriptors.name: focused-window
queryDescriptors.summary: Return the focused managed window snapshot.

selectors.name: window
selectors.summary: Filter by a session-scoped opaque window id.

selectors.name: workspace
selectors.summary: Filter by workspace raw name, display name, or id.

selectors.name: display
selectors.summary: Filter by display name or display id.

selectors.name: focused
selectors.summary: Only include the focused managed window.

selectors.name: visible
selectors.summary: Only include windows on visible workspaces that are not hidden.

queryDescriptors.name: workspaces

selectors.name: workspace
selectors.summary: Filter by workspace raw name, display name, or id.

selectors.name: display
selectors.summary: Filter by active monitor name or display id.

selectors.name: current
selectors.summary: Only include the interaction monitor's active workspace.

selectors.name: focused
selectors.summary: Only include the workspace containing the focused managed window.

queryDescriptors.summary: Return configured workspaces with live occupancy and monitor assignment.

queryDescriptors.name: displays

selectors.name: display
selectors.summary: Filter by display name or display id.

queryDescriptors.summary: Return connected displays with live geometry and active workspace state.

queryDescriptors.name: rules
queryDescriptors.summary: Return persisted user window rules with normalized public fields.

queryDescriptors.name: rule-actions
queryDescriptors.summary: Return the public persisted-rule action registry.

queryDescriptors.name: queries
queryDescriptors.summary: Return the public automation query registry.

queryDescriptors.name: commands
queryDescriptors.summary: Return the public automation command registry.

queryDescriptors.name: capabilities
queryDescriptors.summary: Return protocol, command, query, selector, and subscription capabilities.

queryDescriptors.name: focused-window-decision
queryDescriptors.summary: Return the focused window rule/debug decision snapshot.

ruleActionDescriptors.name: add
ruleActionDescriptors.summary: Append a new persisted user rule.

ruleActionDescriptors.name: replace
ruleActionDescriptors.summary: Replace a persisted user rule in place.

ruleActionDescriptors.name: move
ruleActionDescriptors.summary: Move a persisted user rule to a one-based position.

ruleActionDescriptors.name: apply

options.summary: Reapply rules to the currently focused automation target.
Reapply rules to a specific managed window by opaque id.
Reapply rules to all managed windows for a process id.

ruleActionDescriptors.summary: Reapply the current rule set to a focused window, explicit window id, or process.

subscriptionDescriptors.summary: Interaction monitor and active workspace updates.
Focused monitor updates for the current interaction target.

windowActionDescriptors.name: focus
windowActionDescriptors.summary: Focus a managed window by session-scoped opaque id.

windowActionDescriptors.name: navigate
windowActionDescriptors.summary: Navigate to a managed window by session-scoped opaque id.

windowActionDescriptors.name: summon-right
windowActionDescriptors.summary: Summon a managed window to the right of the focused window.

workspaceActionDescriptors.name: focus-name
workspaceActionDescriptors.summary: Focus a workspace by raw workspace ID or unambiguous configured display name.
